newsitems.title: H A T S
newsitems.author: vedinad
newsitems.contents: This update adds hats and features for version 1.0.64. [list][*]21 Hats and Achievements[*]New Megachad skin[/list] Edit 01/26/2026 V1.0.65 Hotfix [list][*]Fixed the extreme damage bug linked to Joe's Dagger[*]Fixed missing translations[/list] Edit 02/04/2026 V1.0.69 Hotfix [list][*]Fixed a level 9999 progression bug[*]Fixed Auto Leveling Tome stats[*]Fixed HP Regen stacking[*]Fixed hat unlock issues[/list]
